summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TrustOS 5-step payment flow. All 3 risk flows (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH) tested end-to-end. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid for product cards uses product.id (prod_low, prod_med, prod_high) not numeric index — works fine but document for future testers
DeliveryScreen has single simulate-delivery-btn that serves as both 'Dispatch' and 'Deliver' — no separate simulate-dispatch-btn testid exists (feature works but testid naming could be clearer)
InputOTP component underlying input is accessible via input[inputmode='numeric'] — requires fill() method not type() to properly set OTP value
test_credentials: No auth required. Demo OTP for HIGH risk: 847291
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 flows fully tested. Correct selectors: product-card-prod_low/med/high, evaluate-risk-btn, place-order-btn, continue-to-delivery-btn, simulate-delivery-btn (same btn for dispatch+deliver), proceed-to-verification-btn, verify-otp-btn, start-camera-btn, proceed-to-checklist-btn, checklist-seal/open/show, submit-verification-btn, confirm-delivery-btn (MEDIUM), new-transaction-btn. OTP input selector: input[inputmode='numeric'], use fill() method.
passed_tests: Order screen: 3 product cards visible with LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH labels
Product card click navigates to risk evaluation view
Evaluate Risk button shows loading then risk score gauge
LOW: risk score 25 (correct), MEDIUM: 51.5 (correct), HIGH: 114.4 (correct)
Place Order button appears after evaluation
LOW payment: Captured, MEDIUM: Authorized, HIGH: Held
Settlement controlled by TrustOS note shown
Continue to Delivery button works
Delivery: 3-step timeline (Placed→Shipped→Delivered)
Simulate Dispatch/Delivery buttons progress timeline
Proceed to Verification after delivery complete
LOW: 30-second countdown timer auto-completes → Payment Released
MEDIUM: I received my order button → Payment Released
HIGH: OTP section visible with Demo OTP 847291 displayed
HIGH: Wrong OTP shows error message
HIGH: Correct OTP 847291 passes verification
HIGH: Video verification with Start Camera → scanning animation → success
HIGH: Package checklist 3 items (seal/open/show) → Submit Verification
HIGH: Final screen Payment Released
Journey table has all 5 rows: Risk, Payment, Delivery, Verification, Settlement
New Transaction button resets entire flow
Live logs panel updates with each action
Step indicator in Navbar shows correct active step
